description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Select the cheapest active web hosting plan that offers at least 50GB of solid-state storage and costs $40/month or less, then proceed to checkout with only that plan selected on a monthly billing cycle.

tasks.instruction: Submit a video production quote request for an approximately 90-second corporate promo with on-site filming in New York City and a maximum budget of $8,000, including your contact information.

tasks.instruction: Book the earliest available 30-minute online consultation for a website redesign taking place next calendar week between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM, and set the company size to 11–50 employees.

tasks.instruction: Create a monthly digital marketing bundle that includes SEO, social media management, and blog content by choosing the most advanced SEO plan costing at most $500/month, then the highest-tier social media plan that keeps the running total at or below $900/month, and finally the lowest-priced blog plan that still includes at least one post per month while keeping the overall total at or below $900/month, and then request a proposal.

tasks.instruction: After filtering case studies for the retail industry and for both IT support and video production services, open the first case study shown and use its contact option to send a brief inquiry to sales.

target_names: Omnichannel Retail Refresh with Managed IT and In-Store Video Experiences

expected_values.message: We are a retail company interested in IT support and video production services similar to this case study.

tasks.instruction: In the help center, search for cloud backup content, filter to the cloud services topic, sort results by most recent, then open the newest cloud backup article and save it to a reading list or favorites.

target_names: Getting Started with Cloud Backup for Your Servers and Workstations

tasks.instruction: Open the support section and submit a high-priority ticket as an existing customer about a stalled email migration, selecting the email and collaboration category and providing a detailed subject and description.

expected_values.subject: Urgent: Email migration not completing
expected_values.description: We started migrating 25 user mailboxes to your hosted email service, and the migration has stalled at 60% for over 4 hours. Please advise on next steps.
